assertions.expectation: Explains that spot VMs can be preempted at any time, which interacts with the upgrade drain process
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains spot VMs can be preempted during upgrade process, creating 'double jeopardy' with both planned upgrade disruptions and potential spot preemptions

assertions.expectation: Notes that spot node pools may already have workloads designed for interruption (good for upgrades)
assertions.reason: Response doesn't mention that spot workloads are typically designed for interruption, which would make them more suitable for upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends higher maxSurge for spot pools since the workloads should already be fault-tolerant
assertions.reason: Response shows using 33% maxSurge and mentions surge upgrade strategy for mixed node pools

assertions.expectation: Advises setting maxUnavailable >0 for spot pools since workloads are already preemption-tolerant
assertions.reason: Response doesn't discuss maxUnavailable settings or mention that spot workloads' preemption-tolerance allows for higher unavailability

assertions.expectation: Mentions that spot VM availability may affect surge node creation (not guaranteed to get spot instances)
assertions.reason: Response doesn't discuss the potential issue of spot VM availability affecting the ability to create surge nodes during upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends having PDBs even for spot workloads to ensure orderly drain during upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes a PDB example and emphasizes verifying Pod Disruption Budgets as part of pre-upgrade preparations

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for configuring surge settings on the spot pool
assertions.reason: Response provides Azure CLI commands (az aks) instead of gcloud commands for GCP/GKE

assertions.expectation: Suggests upgrading spot pools before on-demand pools since they're lower risk
assertions.reason: Response actually recommends upgrading on-demand nodes first, then spot nodes, which is opposite to the expectation
